Common.signIn: Please sign in to use this feature.
Common.joinSpaceToUse: Please join this space to use this feature.
Common.noSpacesYet: No spaces created or joined yet. Explore our network and join a Space, or create your own.

nestedSpacesButton.label: Space Navigation
nestedSpacesButton.noAccess: You do not have access to view space navigation.

SpaceSettingsAction.title: Space Settings
SpaceSettingsAction.content: Access and manage the settings for your space, including its appearance, structure, methods, membership, and treasury.

spaceConfiguration.title: Space Configuration
spaceConfiguration.description: Customise your space by setting its purpose, adding branding elements, and linking social media.

spaceTransparencyConfiguration.title: Space Transparency Configuration
spaceTransparencyConfiguration.description: Define the level of transparency you collectively want to apply to your space.

addSpace.title: Add Space
addSpace.description: Create a new space within your organisation for activities, teams, or projects.

activateSpaces.title: Activate Space(s)
activateSpaces.description: Contribute HYPHA or USDC to activate your space(s) and support the Hypha Network.

votingMethod.title: Voting Method
votingMethod.description: Select and configure the voting method for decision-making within your space.

entryMethod.title: Entry Method
entryMethod.description: Select and configure the process by which new members join your space.

membershipExit.title: Membership Exit
membershipExit.description: Remove a member from your space if they infringe upon agreed rules and policies.

spaceToSpaceMembership.title: Space-to-Space Membership
spaceToSpaceMembership.description: Allow your space to join another space as a member, gaining the ability to participate in governance and vote on proposals.

issueNewToken.title: Issue New Token
issueNewToken.description: Create a new token for utility, ownership, impact, cash credits, voice, or community currency within your space.

mintTokensToSpaceTreasury.title: Mint Tokens to Space Treasury
mintTokensToSpaceTreasury.description: Mint tokens into your space treasury to fund operations, distribute rewards, or provide liquidity.

buyHyphaTokensRewards.title: Buy Hypha Tokens (Rewards)
buyHyphaTokensRewards.description: Purchase Hypha tokens to participate in the network and earn rewards.

depositFunds.title: Deposit Funds
depositFunds.description: Deposit funds into your treasury by copying the treasury address or scanning the QR code.

integrateSmartContractInSpace.title: Integrate Smart Contract in Space (Advanced)
integrateSmartContractInSpace.description: Enable your space to take multisig ownership of your smart contracts, allowing your community to govern value flows (tokenomics) directly from your space.

exploreExtensionsMarketplaceComingSoon.title: Explore Extensions & Plug-in Marketplace (Coming Soon)
exploreExtensionsMarketplaceComingSoon.description: Discover a growing ecosystem of tools and integrations to extend your space's capabilities.

hyphaEnergy.title: Hypha Energy
hyphaEnergy.description: A dedicated platform for your renewable energy community or hub, enabling local energy sharing, energy asset co-ownership, governance, and fair value distribution between members.

SelectCreateAction.title: Create a Proposal
SelectCreateAction.content: Select an action to contribute, collaborate, make decisions or manage resources within your space.

makeCollectiveAgreement.title: Make a Collective Agreement
makeCollectiveAgreement.description: Define and formalise a mutual understanding, policy, or decision among members of the space.

proposeContribution.title: Propose a Contribution
proposeContribution.description: Propose a new contribution, such as work, knowledge, capital, or resources, for the space to consider.

payExpenses.title: Pay Expenses for Products or Services
payExpenses.description: Make payments for products and services by transferring funds from your space treasury to another space, entity, or individual wallet.

acceptInvestmentComingSoon.title: Accept Investment (Coming Soon)
acceptInvestmentComingSoon.description: Receive capital from investors, members, or aligned spaces in exchange for native space tokens.

exchangeOwnershipComingSoon.title: Exchange Ownership (Coming Soon)
exchangeOwnershipComingSoon.description: Swap ownership between members or spaces, whether selling a stake or exchanging assets.

deployFunds.title: Deploy Funds
deployFunds.description: Allocate treasury funds for investments in other spaces in the network or for distributing resources across spaces within your organisation.

depositFunds.title: Deposit Funds
depositFunds.description: Deposit funds into your treasury by copying the treasury address or scanning the QR code.

SelectActivateAction.title: Activate Space
SelectActivateAction.content: Choose one of the options below to activate your Space and unlock all the features available on the Hypha Network.

depositFunds.title: Deposit Funds
depositFunds.description: Deposit funds into your treasury by copying the treasury address or scanning the QR code.

buyHyphaTokensRewards.title: Buy Hypha Tokens (Rewards)
buyHyphaTokensRewards.description: Purchase Hypha tokens to participate in the network and earn rewards.

activateSpaces.title: Activate Space(s)
activateSpaces.description: Contribute HYPHA or USDC to activate your space(s) and support the Hypha Network.

SelectNavigationAction.title: Space Navigation
SelectNavigationAction.content: Navigate all your spaces in a single interactive map to see how they connect to each other. Easily visit nested spaces, explore space-to-space memberships, and follow value flows across your direct ecosystem.

visibleSpaces.noAccessAddSpace: You do not have access to add spaces to this organization.

Profile.claimOnlyOnPersonalPage: Claim is only available on your personal page
Profile.rewardValueMustBeGreaterThanZero: The reward value must be greater than 0
Profile.noRewardsFoundForUser: No rewards found for this user
Profile.noAssetsFoundForUser: No assets found for this user

ProfileActions.content: Manage your personal funds, interact with the Hypha network, and contribute directly using your wallet.

depositFunds.title: Deposit Funds
depositFunds.description: Add tokens to your personal wallet by copying your wallet address or scanning the QR code.

transferFunds.title: Transfer Funds
transferFunds.description: Send tokens from your personal wallet to a member, space, or custom address.

buyHyphaTokensRewards.title: Buy Hypha Tokens (Rewards)
buyHyphaTokensRewards.description: Purchase Hypha tokens to participate in the network and earn rewards

activateSpaces.title: Activate Space(s)
activateSpaces.description: Sponsor and activate your favourite space(s) by contributing HYPHA or USDC, supporting the Hypha Network.

migrateHyphaTokens.title: Migrate Hypha Tokens (Telos → Base)
migrateHyphaTokens.description: Move your Hypha tokens from the Telos blockchain to the Base network. Initiates the migration experience.

purchaseHypha.title: Buy Hypha Tokens (Rewards)
purchaseHypha.content: Use USDC to buy Hypha, earn rewards, and take part in governance if you choose.

activateSpaces.title: Activate Space(s)
activateSpaces.contentPrefix: Sponsor and activate your favourite space(s) by contributing HYPHA or USDC, supporting the Hypha Network. More details in

transferFunds.title: Transfer Funds
transferFunds.content: Easily send funds from your wallet to a member or a space.

errors.loadSpaces: Failed to load spaces. Please try again later.

Spaces.spaceLinkDescription: Your space name is automatically added to the end of your space link. You can edit it if needed, but it must remain unique.
Spaces.sandboxDescription: Use Sandbox Mode to configure and test your space only on My Spaces, sharing it with your team via URL while laying the foundation for regenerative purpose.
Spaces.pilotDescription: Use Pilot Mode to share your space for demos, use case validation, or as a replicable template. Expand your reach, activate member participation, and gather feedback.
Spaces.liveDescription: Use Live Mode to make your space fully operational and publicly discoverable, generating sustainable value and turning your purpose into regenerative impact.
Spaces.archiveDescription: Archive this space to temporarily pause activity or deactivate it while keeping all data and history safe. You can reactivate it anytime by selecting a different activation mode.
Spaces.selectCategoryError: Please select at least one tag category.
Spaces.selectParentError: Please select a linked space or enable "Root Space"
Spaces.slugFieldRegex: This field can only contain lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens, and apostrophes.
Spaces.slugAlreadyExistsLong: A space with this name already exists. Please choose a different name for your space.
Spaces.becomeMemberOrRequestInvite: Become a member or request invite
Spaces.inviteAlreadySubmitted: You’ve already submitted your invite request. Your proposal is now visible to space members for review. If needed, you’ll be able to resubmit 24 hours after your last submission.
Spaces.tokenRequirements: You’re not able to join just yet. Fulfil the token requirements to gain access.
Spaces.exitSpaceConfirmDescription: Do you really want to exit this space?
Spaces.exitSpaceDisabledTooltip: You need to be authorized and to be a member of the current space to be able to exit
Spaces.accessDeniedNotLoggedIn: You need an active account to access this section. Please sign in or click Get Started to create one.
Spaces.accessDeniedNotMember: You need to become a member to access this feature. Join the space now to view the activity of this space.
Spaces.errorOhSnap: Oh snap! There was an error
Spaces.trialBannerTitle: Only {daysLeft} days left in your free trial!
Spaces.trialBannerSubtitle: Contribute $11 per month in USDC or Hypha tokens to the Hypha Network to unlock full access for your Space and keep your progress going!
Spaces.beforeExpiryBannerTitle: Only {daysLeft} days left before your Hypha Network contribution expires!
Spaces.beforeExpiryBannerSubtitle: Don’t lose access to your Space features! Renew now by contributing $11 per month in USDC or Hypha tokens to the Hypha Network.
Spaces.expiredBannerTitle: Your Hypha Network contribution expired {daysAgo} days ago!
Spaces.expiredBannerSubtitle: Reactivate now by contributing $11 per month in USDC or Hypha tokens to the Hypha Network and regain access to all your Space features.
Spaces.proposalExpiredSubtitle: Your Hypha Network contribution expired {expiredElapsed}. Please reactivate your space before submitting a new proposal.
